description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a large, overhanging flat roof and a rectangular footprint. The exterior features extensive use of wood paneling, large glass windows, and a spacious outdoor deck area with seating and a swimming pool. The front facade includes a mix of horizontal and vertical window arrangements, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The roof has a central rectangular cutout, likely for a skylight or rooftop garden, and the landscaping includes small trees and potted plants. The building sits on a tiled base, with outdoor living spaces seamlessly integrated into the design. The overall style is sleek and minimalist, emphasizing open spaces and clean lines.
description: A modern, wood-paneled bungalow with a flat overhanging roof, large windows, and an outdoor pool and deck area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, outdoor deck with seating, and a swimming pool.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool, outdoor dining area, and a tree near the edge of the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a long balcony, multiple windows, and a tiled walkway with potted plants.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the deck, pool, and a tree, with the roof cutout visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and horizontal windows
